description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:latest Docker image with a global npm-merge-driver installed via npx and dependencies installed via npm ci in a before_script applied to all jobs. Define a CI variable set to "true" and two stages: test and renovate. In the test stage add a lint job that runs npm run lint, and a test job that runs npm test. Both jobs inherit the before_script and run on any branch.
